mapper.insert: insert into mvcboard2 (bname, bpass, btitle, bcontent, bip) value(#{bname}, #{bpass}, #{btitle}, #{bcontent}, #{bip})
mapper.update: update mvcboard2 set btitle = #{btitle}, bcontent=#{bcontent} where bno=#{bno} and bpass=#{bpass}
mapper.delete: delete from mvcboard2 where bno=#{bno} and bpass=#{bpass}
mapper.update: update mvcboard2 set bhit=bhit+1 where bno = #{bno}
